message:
Command `WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== Check what DRT uses as input ==="
echo "Step 37 (diodesonports) state_out:"
python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('$WRAPPER_RUN/37-odb-diodesonports/state_out.json')); print('odb:', d.get('odb'))"
echo ""
echo "Step 35 (globalrouting) state_out:"
python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('$WRAPPER_RUN/35-openroad-globalrouting/state_out.json')); print('odb:', d.get('odb'))"

echo ""
echo "=== Try --from OpenROAD.DetailedRouting using step 37's state (before failed step 38) ==="
echo "Step 37 state_out has the post-diodes-insertion ODB"
echo "Step 38 failed - we can restart from DetailedRouting using step 37's ODB"` executed with exit code 0.

WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== Check what DRT uses as input ==="
echo "Step 37 (diodesonports) state_out:"
python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('$WRAPPER_RUN/37-odb-diodesonports/state_out.json')); print('odb:', d.get('odb'))"
echo ""
echo "Step 35 (globalrouting) state_out:"
python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('$WRAPPER_RUN/35-openroad-globalrouting/state_out.json')); print('odb:', d.get('odb'))"

echo ""
echo "=== Try --from OpenROAD.DetailedRouting using step 37's state (before failed step 38) ==="
echo "Step 37 state_out has the post-diodes-insertion ODB"
echo "Step 38 failed - we can restart from DetailedRouting using step 37's ODB"
